chapter.title: Risk Intelligence
chapter.summary: 4 alert types analyzed. 6 flagged alert(s) parsed. 5 suspicious user(s) highlighted.

event_analyses.executive_summary: PROVE OI/platform limit reached 112.65% (threshold 80%), OI deviation from 24H average 188.16%. Position holders grew from 6,813 at 00:00 to 8,451 at 15:00 HKT (+24%), with shorts (5,497) consistently outpacing longs (4,124). Current price $0.2764 (+1.9%), OI 5,631,436 contracts ($1.56M). 5 T1-rated accounts with extreme trade/equity ratios (813,649x to 109,722,000x) hold concentrated PROVE positions. 3 SHORT + 2 LONG, all deposited on 2026-03-26, suggesting coordinated OI inflation.
event_analyses.forward_looking: OI/limit ratio remains above 112% with no sign of natural unwind. Recommended: 1) Immediately evaluate limit reduction or restrict new position opening; 2) Investigate the 5 T1 users (6226956/5014277/2106106/7557536/7601874) deposit chains and order flow; 3) Monitor funding rate and liquidation cascade risk if price moves sharply.

causal_chain.name: Thin float structural weakness
causal_chain.description: PROVE has a thin circulating supply, making OI easily inflatable by a small number of large accounts.

causal_chain.name: Coordinated position buildup
causal_chain.description: Between 00:00-15:00 HKT on 2026-03-27, total position holders grew from 6,813 to 8,451 (+24%). Short holders increased from 4,124 to 5,497 (+33%) while longs grew from 3,384 to 4,124 (+22%). Short growth consistently outpaced long growth.
causal_chain.detail: Short net increase: +1,373 users vs long net increase: +740 users. Approximately 65% of new position holders are short.

evidence_table.title: PROVE-USDT-SWAP Hourly Position Holders (2026-03-27 Data Query)

causal_chain.name: OI/Limit breach (112.65%)
causal_chain.description: OI/platform limit surged to 112.65%, well above the 80% threshold. OI deviation from 24H average hit 188.16% (threshold 20%).
causal_chain.detail: Two sub-alert types triggered simultaneously at critical severity: OI deviation 188.16% + OI/limit 112.65%.

causal_chain.name: 5 T1-rated accounts with extreme ratios
causal_chain.description: 5 accounts (registered 2016-2018, all KYC3 CN) hold concentrated PROVE positions with trade/equity ratios from 813,649x to 109,722,000x. 3 SHORT + 2 LONG, all deposited on 2026-03-26, suggesting coordinated OI inflation.
causal_chain.detail: 6226956: SHORT cross, trade/equity=109.7Mx, equity=$2.63; 5014277: LONG cross, trade/equity=45.3Mx, equity=$1.69; 2106106: SHORT cross, trade/equity=16.2Mx, equity=$3.38; 7557536: SHORT cross, trade/equity=1.24Mx, equity=$187.86; 7601874: LONG cross, trade/equity=813Kx, equity=$217.42

user_profiles.executive_summary: 2017-06-20 PC registration, CN (+86), KYC3 China. Trade volume $288.5M vs equity $2.63 yields an extreme trade/equity ratio of 109,722,000x. SHORT cross on PROVE-USDT-SWAP with last deposit 2026-03-26. Equity is virtually zero — classic shell-account pattern used for OI manipulation.

event_analyses.executive_summary: NFLX OI deviation from 24H average hit 632.38%, an extreme spike on a stock-token perpetual. Current price $93.32 (+1.6%), OI only 312.26 contracts ($29,140 notional), 24H volume just 3,067 contracts. Low absolute OI but the deviation percentage triggered critical alert. ~20 position holders total: roughly 10 long, 10 short. Key users identified: 21607391 (SHORT, 2 positions), 50274600 (LONG, opened today), 54414785 (SHORT), 63503490 (SHORT, 2 positions).
event_analyses.forward_looking: NFLX-USDT-SWAP has thin liquidity with $29K OI notional. The 632% deviation signals unusual concentration but absolute risk is limited. Recommended: 1) Monitor for further position buildup; 2) Review the 4 key users for unusual patterns; 3) Consider tightening position limits if deviation persists.

causal_chain.name: Ultra-thin stock-token OI base
causal_chain.description: NFLX-USDT-SWAP is a stock-token perpetual with extremely low base OI. Even small position changes produce large percentage deviations.
causal_chain.detail: OI notional ~$29,140 with only ~20 position holders. Any single user action can cause 100%+ deviation.

causal_chain.name: OI deviation spike to 632.38%
causal_chain.description: OI deviation from 24H average reached 632.38%, triggering critical platform OI alert. Total OI 312.26 contracts at $93.32/contract = $29,140 notional.
causal_chain.detail: Alert triggered at critical severity due to extreme percentage deviation, despite low absolute OI.

causal_chain.name: Concentrated user activity
causal_chain.description: ~20 users hold positions (~10 long, ~10 short). Key activity from: 21607391 (SHORT, 2 positions), 50274600 (LONG, opened today), 54414785 (SHORT), 63503490 (SHORT, 2 positions).
causal_chain.detail: Position concentration is high with ~20 users controlling the entire OI. Multiple users hold 2 positions each, suggesting strategic position splitting.

chapter.markdown:
# Risk Intelligence

**Summary:** 4 alert types analyzed. 6 flagged alert(s) parsed. 5 suspicious user(s) highlighted.
**Source document:** [PROD]Index Alarm - 2026-03-27 (00:00 - 23:59)

## Suspicious Users
- 573261155016704 — T1 — PROVE-USDT-SWAP SHORT cross, trade/equity=109,722,000x, equity=$2.63, deposit 2026-03-26
- 211349316600729600 — T1 — PROVE-USDT-SWAP LONG cross, trade/equity=45,266,000x, equity=$1.69, deposit 2026-03-26
- 25882071633371136 — T1 — PROVE-USDT-SWAP SHORT cross, trade/equity=16,152,000x, equity=$3.38, deposit 2026-03-26
- 8986687749369856 — T1 — PROVE-USDT-SWAP SHORT cross, trade/equity=1,240,843x, equity=$187.86, deposit 2026-03-26
- 213151826617438208 — T1 — PROVE-USDT-SWAP LONG cross, trade/equity=813,649x, equity=$217.42, deposit 2026-03-26

## Deep Profiles
- 573261155016704 — T1 — 2017-06-20 PC registration, CN (+86), KYC3 China. Trade volume $288.5M vs equity $2.63 yields an extreme trade/equity ratio of 109,722,000x. SHORT cross on PROVE-USDT-SWAP with last deposit 2026-03-26. Equity is virtually zero — classic shell-account pattern used for OI manipulation.

- 25882071633371136 — T1 — 2016-07-05 APP registration, CN (+86), KYC3 China. Trade volume $54.6M vs equity $3.38 — trade/equity ratio 16,152,000x. SHORT cross on PROVE-USDT-SWAP, last deposit 2026-03-26. Oldest account in the cohort (~9.7 years) with near-zero equity.
- 8986687749369856 — T1 — 2018-02-28 H5 registration, CN (+86), KYC3 China. Trade volume $233.1M vs equity $187.86 — trade/equity ratio 1,240,843x. SHORT cross on PROVE-USDT-SWAP, last deposit 2026-03-26. Higher equity than top-3 but ratio still extremely abnormal.
- 213151826617438208 — T1 — 2018-03-05 PC registration, CN (+86), KYC3 China. Trade volume $176.9M vs equity $217.42 — trade/equity ratio 813,649x. LONG cross on PROVE-USDT-SWAP, last deposit 2026-03-26. Second long holder in top-5; may function as counter-party or wash component.
